title: s3-encryption-gateway Helm values
description: Validates values.yaml and overlays for the S3 Encryption Gateway Helm chart (draft-07). Run `helm lint` or `helm install --dry-run` to surface errors client-side before a cluster render.

replicaCount.description: Number of gateway pod replicas. Set to 0 to pause the deployment. Prod overlay sets this to >=3.

track.description: Deployment track label for blue/green and canary topologies. Empty string (default) renders no track label. When set, valkey.enabled MUST be false and config.multipartState.valkey.addr MUST be configured. See docs/OPS_DEPLOYMENT.md.

tag.description: Image tag. Defaults to the chart appVersion.

pullPolicy.description: Kubernetes imagePullPolicy for the gateway container.

imagePullSecrets.description: List of Kubernetes image pull secret names.

nameOverride.description: Override the chart name portion of the generated resource names.

fullnameOverride.description: Fully override the generated resource name prefix.

create.description: Whether to create a dedicated ServiceAccount.

annotations.description: Annotations to add to the ServiceAccount (e.g. EKS IRSA annotation).

name.description: Name to use for the ServiceAccount. Auto-generated when empty and create=true.

podAnnotations.description: Annotations applied to every gateway pod. Free-form; user overlays (e.g. values.fips.yaml) add compliance annotations here.

podSecurityContext.description: Pod-level security context (PodSecurityContext). Arbitrary k8s fields allowed.

securityContext.description: Container-level security context. Arbitrary k8s fields allowed.

service.description: Kubernetes Service configuration for the gateway.

enabled.description: Create a Service. Set false when the operator manages the Service (e.g. blue/green topologies).

targetPort.description: Target port on the pod. Either a port number or a named port.

labels.description: Extra labels to add to the Service (e.g. prometheus: enabled in values.fips.yaml).

name.description: Issuer name. Defaults to fullname template.

namespace.description: Issuer namespace. Defaults to release namespace.

extraDNSNames.description: Additional SAN DNS names for the certificate.

extraEnv.description: Extra environment variables injected into the main container. Free-form; values.fips.yaml adds GOFIPS140/GODEBUG here.

extraVolumeMounts.description: Extra volume mounts added to the main container.

extraVolumes.description: Extra volumes added to the pod spec.

initContainers.description: Init containers that run before the main gateway container.

sidecars.description: Sidecar containers that run alongside the gateway.

resources.description: CPU/memory resource requests and limits for the gateway container.

livenessProbe.description: Kubernetes liveness probe for the gateway container.

readinessProbe.description: Kubernetes readiness probe for the gateway container.

enabled.description: Enable HPA. When true, replicaCount becomes the initial replica count only.

minReplicas.description: Minimum number of replicas the HPA will maintain.

maxReplicas.description: Maximum number of replicas the HPA can scale to.

targetCPUUtilizationPercentage.description: Target CPU utilisation percentage that triggers scale-out.

targetMemoryUtilizationPercentage.description: Target memory utilisation percentage that triggers scale-out.

minAvailable.description: Minimum number (or %) of pods that must be available during voluntary disruptions.

maxUnavailable.description: Maximum number (or %) of pods that can be unavailable during voluntary disruptions.

port.description: Port for the dedicated unauthenticated /metrics listener. 0 (default) disables it and uses the fallback chain (admin port → S3 port).

enableBucketLabel.description: Expose bucket names as a Prometheus label (METRICS_ENABLE_BUCKET_LABEL). Disabled by default to avoid leaking bucket names.

enabled.description: Create a ServiceMonitor resource (requires Prometheus Operator CRDs).

scrapeTimeout.description: Prometheus scrape timeout. Must be less than interval.

labels.description: Extra labels applied to the ServiceMonitor (e.g. track: blue for per-track Prometheus filtering).

podMonitor.description: Prometheus Operator PodMonitor configuration (alternative to ServiceMonitor).

enabled.description: Create a PodMonitor resource (requires Prometheus Operator CRDs).

namespaceIsolation.description: Restrict ingress to same namespace only.

namespaceLabel.description: Namespace selector label key (and optional value) for isolation.

awsS3.description: Allow egress to AWS S3 endpoints.

terminationGracePeriodSeconds.description: Seconds kubelet waits for the pod to terminate gracefully. For blue/green and canary, set to >=99th-percentile request duration + 10 s kube-proxy propagation tail. See docs/OPS_DEPLOYMENT.md §2.

lifecycle.description: Pod lifecycle hooks. Typically a preStop sleep equal to the kube-proxy propagation tail is added here for safe progressive delivery.

nodeSelector.description: Node selector labels for pod scheduling.

affinity.description: Kubernetes affinity rules for pod scheduling.

topologySpreadConstraints.description: Topology spread constraints for distributing pods across nodes and zones.

valkey.description: Valkey subchart passthrough values. The subchart's own schema validates its keys; we expose the top-level block with additionalProperties: true. Used only when valkey.enabled is true (in-cluster subchart for local/dev). Production: set valkey.enabled: false and configure config.multipartState.valkey.addr.

enabled.description: Enable the in-cluster Valkey subchart. MUST be false when track is set.

policies.description: Inline bucket policy definitions. The chart renders a ConfigMap (<release>-policies) from these entries, mounts it at /etc/s3-gateway/policies/, and sets POLICIES automatically. Mutually exclusive with config.policies.value / config.policies.valueFrom (Guard 6).

name.description: Name of the Secret or ConfigMap.

key.description: Key within the Secret or ConfigMap.

valueFromRef.description: Kubernetes valueFrom source — exactly one source key must be present.

oneOf.description: Empty valueFrom (unset — the value field is used instead).

configValue.description: A gateway config leaf that can be provided as a direct value string or via a Kubernetes valueFrom reference.

value.description: Direct string value. Takes precedence over valueFrom when both are present.

valueFrom.description: Kubernetes secret/configmap reference. Use instead of value for sensitive data.

probe.description: Kubernetes container probe definition. Exactly one probe type (httpGet, exec, tcpSocket, grpc) may be set.

httpGet.description: HTTP GET probe. Mutually exclusive with exec and tcpSocket.

exec.description: Exec probe. Mutually exclusive with httpGet and tcpSocket.

tcpSocket.description: TCP socket probe. Mutually exclusive with httpGet and exec.

ingress.description: Ingress configuration. Standard networking.k8s.io/v1 Ingress and Traefik IngressRoute are mutually exclusive.

enabled.description: Enable standard networking.k8s.io/v1 Ingress. Mutually exclusive with ingress.traefik.enabled.

className.description: IngressClassName for the standard Ingress resource.

annotations.description: Annotations for the standard Ingress resource.

tls.description: TLS entries for the standard Ingress.

traefik.description: Traefik IngressRoute/TraefikService configuration. Mutually exclusive with ingress.enabled.

enabled.description: Render Traefik IngressRoute CRD. Requires Traefik >= v3.0. Mutually exclusive with ingress.enabled.

host.description: Host() matcher value — the S3 hostname clients will use.

weighted.description: Weighted TraefikService (CANARY topology). weights must sum to 100 (enforced at template time).

enabled.description: Enable weighted TraefikService. Requires ingress.traefik.enabled: true.

services.description: Backend services with individual weights. All weights must sum to 100. When weighted.enabled is true, at least 2 services are required.

config.description: Gateway application configuration tree. Every leaf supports value (direct string) or valueFrom (k8s secret/configmap reference).

policies.description: Path glob for policy YAML files (e.g. /etc/s3-gateway/policies/*.yaml).

proxiedBucket.description: Restrict the gateway to a single proxied bucket name.

auth.description: Gateway authentication and credential store configuration.

clockSkewTolerance.description: Maximum acceptable clock skew for signature validation (e.g. 5m).

existingCredentialsSecret.description: Reference an existing Kubernetes Secret containing the full credentials list (YAML/JSON). When set, the inline credentials list is ignored.

credentials.description: Gateway-managed credential store. Required unless existingCredentialsSecret is set.

accessKey.description: S3 access key ID for a gateway credential.

secretKey.description: S3 secret access key for a gateway credential.

label.description: Optional human-readable label for audit logs.

accessKey.description: Backend access key ID. Optional when useClientCredentials is true.

secretKey.description: Backend secret access key. Optional when useClientCredentials is true.

usePathStyle.description: Force path-style S3 URLs (required for MinIO, Ceph, etc.).

password.description: Static encryption password for the default key manager.

keyFile.description: Path to an on-disk key file (alternative to password).

keyManager.description: Pluggable KeyManager settings (V0.6-SEC-1). Required when migrating from static password to KMS.

enabled.description: Enable the pluggable KeyManager (\"true\"/\"false\"). When \"true\", provider and provider-specific config must be set.

value.description: KMS provider identifier. Extend enum as new providers land.

dualReadWindow.description: Number of previous key versions to attempt on decrypt during a key rotation window.

timeout.description: KMS request timeout (Go duration string, e.g. 10s).

caCert.description: TLS CA certificate (base64 PEM). Required for binary KMIP.

clientCert.description: TLS client certificate for mTLS. Required for binary KMIP.

clientKey.description: TLS client private key for mTLS.

insecureSkipVerify.description: Skip TLS verification (testing ONLY — do not use in production).

pbkdf2.description: PBKDF2-SHA256 configuration (active when no argon2id support is compiled in).

value.description: PBKDF2-SHA256 iteration count. NIST SP 800-132 (2023) minimum: 600000. Must be >= 100000.

minSize.description: Minimum response size in bytes before compression is applied.

contentTypes.description: Comma-separated MIME types eligible for compression.

readTimeout.description: Maximum duration for reading the entire request (0s = disabled; recommended — readHeaderTimeout covers slow-loris; a non-zero value kills large object streams).

writeTimeout.description: Maximum duration before timing out writes of the response (0s = disabled; recommended for large S3 object streaming).

idleTimeout.description: Maximum time to wait for the next request on keep-alive connections (e.g. 60s).

readHeaderTimeout.description: Maximum time to read request headers (e.g. 10s).

maxHeaderBytes.description: Maximum size in bytes of HTTP request headers (e.g. 1048576 = 1 MiB).

tls.description: TLS termination settings for the gateway listener.

enabled.description: Enable TLS on the listener (\"true\"/\"false\"). When \"true\" and useCertManager=\"false\", certFile and keyFile must be set.

useCertManager.description: Use cert-manager to provision the TLS certificate automatically.

certFile.description: Path or base64 PEM of the TLS certificate. Required when tls.enabled=true and useCertManager=false.

keyFile.description: Path or base64 PEM of the TLS private key. Required when tls.enabled=true and useCertManager=false.

limit.description: Maximum number of requests per window (integer string, e.g. \"100\").

window.description: Rate-limit window duration (Go duration string, e.g. 60s).

maxSize.description: Maximum cache size in bytes (e.g. 104857600 = 100 MiB).

defaultTTL.description: Default cache entry TTL (Go duration string, e.g. 5m).

maxEvents.description: Maximum number of in-memory audit events before flushing.

redactMetadataKeys.description: Comma-separated list of object metadata key prefixes to redact in audit logs.

endpoint.description: HTTP endpoint URL for the \"http\" sink type.

filePath.description: File path for the \"file\" sink type.

batchSize.description: Number of events per flush batch.

retryCount.description: Number of retry attempts for sink delivery failures.

retryBackoff.description: Backoff duration between retries (Go duration string, e.g. 1s).

multipartState.description: Encrypted multipart upload state store (V0.6-SEC-3 / ADR-0009). External Valkey is required when track is set.

valkey.description: External Valkey connection settings for multipart state.

addr.description: Valkey address (host:port). Required when track is set.

tls.description: TLS settings for the Valkey connection.

caFile.description: CA certificate file path for Valkey TLS.

certFile.description: Client certificate for mTLS to Valkey.

keyFile.description: Client private key for mTLS to Valkey.

insecureAllowPlaintext.description: Allow plaintext Valkey connections (development ONLY — never use in production).

ttlSeconds.description: TTL in seconds for in-flight MPU state records (default gateway-internal: 604800 = 7 days).

admin.description: Admin API configuration (V0.6-CFG-1). Exposes key-rotation and health endpoints.

invariantTrackRequiresExternalValkey.description: I1: When track is a non-empty value (blue/green/canary), valkey.enabled MUST be false and config.multipartState.valkey.addr MUST be set.

enabled.description: valkey.enabled must be false when track is set. All track instances must share a single external Valkey cluster.

invariantIngressMutex.description: I2: ingress.enabled and ingress.traefik.enabled are mutually exclusive. Choose standard Ingress or Traefik IngressRoute, not both.

invariantKeyManagerProviderRequired.description: I5: When keyManager.enabled.value is 'true', provider must be a valid enum and cosmian-specific fields must be present if provider is 'cosmian'.

policyEntry.description: A single bucket policy definition. Maps 1:1 to PolicyConfig (internal/config/policy.go). Each entry is serialised to a YAML file inside the chart-managed ConfigMap.

id.description: Unique policy identifier. Used as the filename stem inside the ConfigMap (slashes and spaces are replaced with hyphens).

buckets.description: Bucket name glob patterns this policy applies to (e.g. ["my-bucket", "logs-*"]).

encrypt_multipart_uploads.description: Opt-in encrypted multipart uploads for matching buckets (ADR-0009). Requires Valkey to be configured. Default false.

require_encryption.description: Reject unencrypted PutObject / UploadPartCopy requests into matching buckets. Default false.

disallow_lock_bypass.description: Reject requests that attempt to bypass object lock for matching buckets. Default false.

encryption.description: Per-bucket encryption overrides (password, algorithm, key manager). Optional.

invariantTLSCertRequired.description: I7: When tls.enabled=true and useCertManager=false, certFile and keyFile must be set.
